de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AuxiliaryContract, SpecificationElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    BlockContractImpl, LoopContractImpl

    public abstract class AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
extends java.lang.Object
implements AuxiliaryContract
    Abstract base class for all default implementations of the sub-interfaces of AuxiliaryContract.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      protected static class  AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Combinator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
      This class is used to to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
      protected static class  AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
      This class contains a builder method for AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpls (AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator.create()).

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AuxiliaryContract

        AuxiliaryContract.Terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables, AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl

        public AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl(java.lang.String baseName,
                                     StatementBlock block,
                                     java.util.List<Label> labels,
                                     IProgramMethod method,
                                     Modality modality,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> preconditions,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePreconditions,
                                     Term measuredBy,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> postconditions,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePostconditions,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> modifiesClauses,
                                     ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs,
                                     AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables,
                                     boolean transactionApplicable,
                                     java.util.Map<LocationVariable,java.lang.Boolean> hasMod,
                                     ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> functionalContracts)
        Parameters:
        baseName - the base name.
        block - the block this contract belongs to.
        labels - all labels belonging to the block.
        method - the method containing the block.
        modality - this contract's modality.
        preconditions - this contract's preconditions on every heap.
        measuredBy - this contract's measured-by term.
        postconditions - this contract's postconditions on every heap.
        modifiesClauses - this contract's modifies clauses on every heap.
        infFlowSpecs - this contract's information flow specifications.
        variables - this contract's variables.
        transactionApplicable - whether or not this contract is applicable for transactions.
        hasMod - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a modified clause.
        functionalContracts - the functional contracts corresponding to this contract.

    • Method Detail

      • getBaseName

        public java.lang.String getBaseName()
        Specified by:
        getBaseName in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        this contract's base name.

        Specified by:
        getBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the block this contract belongs to.

        Specified by:
        getLabels in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        all labels belonging to AuxiliaryContract.getBlock()

        Specified by:
        getMethod in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the method containing AuxiliaryContract.getBlock()

      • getKJT

        public KeYJavaType getKJT()
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.

      • getModality

        public Modality getModality()
        Specified by:
        getModality in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        this contract's modality.

      • getPlaceholderVariables

        public AuxiliaryContract.Variables getPlaceholderVariables()
        Description copied from interface: AuxiliaryContract
        Returns the set of placeholder variables created during this contract's instantiation. These are replaced by the real variables with the same names when the contract is applied.
        Specified by:
        getPlaceholderVariables in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the placeholder variables used created during this contracts instantiation.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

      • getVisibility

        public VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
        Specified by:
        getVisibility in interface SpecificationElement

      • isTransactionApplicable

        public boolean isTransactionApplicable()
        Specified by:
        isTransactionApplicable in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        true if and only if this contract is applicable for transactions.

      • isReadOnly

        public boolean isReadOnly(Services services)
        Specified by:
        isReadOnly in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        true if and only if this contract is read-only.

      • hasModifiesClause

        public boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
        Description copied from interface: AuxiliaryContract
        Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
        Specified by:
        hasModifiesClause in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        Returns:
        whether this contract is strictly pure.

      • getVariables

        public AuxiliaryContract.Variables getVariables()
        Specified by:
        getVariables in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the original used variables like self, result etc..

      • getVariablesAsTerms

        public AuxiliaryContract.Terms getVariablesAsTerms(Services services)
        Specified by:
        getVariablesAsTerms in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the original used variables like self, result etc. as terms.

      • getTerm

        public Term getTerm(Term term,
                    AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables,
                    Services services)
        Replaces variables in a map of terms
        Parameters:
        term - a term.
        variables - replacements for getVariables()
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the term with every occurrence of a variable from getVariables() replaced.

      • getTerm

        public Term getTerm(Term term,
                    Term heap,
                    AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms,
                    Services services)
        Replaces variables in a map of terms
        Parameters:
        term - a term.
        heap - the replacement heap
        terms - replacements for getVariables()
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the term with every occurrence of a variable from getVariables() replaced.

      • getMby

        public Term getMby()
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

      • getMby

        public Term getMby(AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables,
                   Services services)
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        variables - variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

      • getMby

        public Term getMby(ProgramVariable selfVar,
                   Services services)
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        selfVar - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

      • getMby

        public Term getMby(java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms,
                   Term selfTerm,
                   java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
                   Services services)
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heapTerms - the heaps to use.
        selfTerm - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

      • getPrecondition

        public Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap,
                            ProgramVariable self,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPres,
                            Services services)
        Specified by:
        getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        self - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      • getPrecondition

        public Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable,
                            Term heap,
                            Term self,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
                            Services services)
        Specified by:
        getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heapVariable - the heap to use.
        heap - the heap to use.
        self - the self variable to use to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      • getPrecondition

        public Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap,
                            Services services)
        Specified by:
        getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      • getPrecondition

        public Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap,
                            AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables,
                            Services services)
        Specified by:
        getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        variables - the variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this contract's precondition on the specified heap with all free program variables replaced by those in variables.

      • getRequiresFree

        Specified by:
        getRequiresFree in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        Returns:
        this contract's free precondition on the specified heap.

      • hasMby

        public boolean hasMby()
        Specified by:
        hasMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        true if and only if this contract has a measured-by clause.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getMby()

        public boolean hasInfFlowSpecs()
        Specified by:
        hasInfFlowSpecs in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        true if and only if this contract has information flow specs.

        public void setInstantiationSelf(Term selfInstantiation)
        Specified by:
        setInstantiationSelf in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        selfInstantiation - the new instantiation self term.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getInstantiationSelfTerm()

      • getInstantiationSelfTerm

        public Term getInstantiationSelfTerm()
        Specified by:
        getInstantiationSelfTerm in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the self variable as a term.

      • getInstantiationSelfTerm

        public Term getInstantiationSelfTerm(TermServices services)
        Specified by:
        getInstantiationSelfTerm in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the term internally used for self or a newly instantiated one. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.

      • getTarget

        public IProgramMethod getTarget()
        Specified by:
        getTarget in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        the method in which the block is located.

        Specified by:
        getAssignable in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        this contract's assignable term on the specified heap.

        Specified by:
        getPlainText in interface AuxiliaryContract

                                     AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms)
        Specified by:
        getPlainText in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        terms - the terms to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
        Returns:
        a plain text representation of this contract.

        Specified by:

        the contract's variabels converted to OriginalVariables.

      • getFunctionalContracts

        public ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> getFunctionalContracts()
        Specified by:
        getFunctionalContracts in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Returns:
        all FunctionalAuxiliaryContracts with a valid id that correspond to this BlockSpecificationElement. Unless this contract is a combination of other contracts, the resulting set will only contain one element.

      • setFunctionalContract

        public void setFunctionalContract(FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?> contract)
        Specified by:
        setFunctionalContract in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Parameters:
        contract - the new functional contract.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getFunctionalContracts()

      • createReplacementMap

        protected java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable> createReplacementMap(AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables,
                                                                              Services services)
        Parameters:
        newVariables - new variables.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        a map from every variable in getVariables() to its counterpart in newVariables.

      • createReplacementMap

        protected java.util.Map<Term,Term> createReplacementMap(Term newHeap,
                                                        AuxiliaryContract.Terms newTerms,
                                                        Services services)
        Parameters:
        newHeap - new base heap.
        newTerms - new terms.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        a map from every term in getVariables().termify() to its counterpart in newTerms, and from the base heap to heap.
